policy.contextRule: Contextual findings require product-specific evidence and may be accepted with an explicit rationale.
policy.preferenceRule: Named colors, fonts, punctuation, shapes, and common layout families are advisory signals only.

sources.usage: Curated concepts only. The mutable source prompt is not bundled, executed, or appended to global agent instructions.

rules.title: Content remains available without entrance motion
rules.principle: Primary content must not depend on an opacity reveal, animation completion, or script timing to become usable.
evidenceRequired: Browser or implementation evidence showing meaningful content in the initial or reduced-motion state.

rules.title: Controls are real and operable
rules.principle: Visible controls must have working states, keyboard behavior, labels, and recovery paths appropriate to the surface.
evidenceRequired: Interaction replay, component test, or code evidence for visible controls.

rules.title: Text and controls remain legible
rules.principle: Color, layering, effects, and imagery must preserve readable content and distinguish interactive states.
evidenceRequired: Contrast measurement or visual evidence under the implemented rendering conditions.

rules.title: Responsive layouts do not clip or collide
rules.principle: Text, controls, media, and overlapping sections must remain usable at the declared viewport range.
evidenceRequired: Mobile and desktop captures or automated layout evidence.

rules.title: Non-trivial motion has a reduced-motion path
rules.principle: Animation must not be required for comprehension and must honor reduced-motion preferences when non-trivial motion exists.
evidenceRequired: Reduced-motion implementation and replay evidence, or a documented no-motion applicability reason.

rules.title: References contribute language, not copied identity
rules.principle: Reference analysis may adopt design properties but must not silently copy protected identity, assets, copy, or product-specific content.
evidenceRequired: Adopted and rejected source-property decisions plus asset permission notes.

rules.title: The surface belongs to one coherent design world
rules.principle: Palette, type, geometry, spacing, assets, and motion should support the same product-specific thesis.
evidenceRequired: Design tokens, direction rationale, or rendered evidence showing system-level cohesion.

rules.title: Signature elements are grounded in the product
rules.principle: A distinctive artifact, silhouette, composition, or interaction should express the subject rather than decorate an unrelated template.
evidenceRequired: Brief-to-design mapping for the signature element.

rules.title: Common template patterns do not dominate the composition
rules.principle: Evaluate the combined density of familiar hero, CTA, card, pricing, testimonial, and footer skeletons instead of banning one pattern in isolation.
evidenceRequired: Direction or rendered-layout review identifying repeated layout families.

rules.title: Decorative effects have a product or interaction purpose
rules.principle: Glows, glass, gradients, grain, floating layers, and ambient motion should support hierarchy, atmosphere, feedback, or narrative.
evidenceRequired: Purpose statement and rendered evidence for prominent effects.

rules.title: Content and data are specific to the product
rules.principle: Copy, data, states, assets, and labels should be plausible for the actual product rather than generic filler.
evidenceRequired: Representative content or data evidence tied to the brief.

rules.title: Component defaults are adapted to the product system
rules.principle: Accessible component primitives may be reused, but their visual defaults should be reconciled with the product's tokens and interaction language.
evidenceRequired: Component-spec or rendered evidence showing deliberate adaptation.

rules.title: Fashion-pattern signals remain advisory
rules.principle: Named colors, fonts, punctuation, pills, cards, gradients, shadows, and familiar layout families require context rather than automatic rejection.
evidenceRequired: Design rationale when a commonly criticized pattern is prominent.
